name: New England Chuck Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 Stalk celery, cut into eight pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the meat with seasonings.
2. Place onions, carrots, and celery in the crockpot.
3. Top with meat and add bay leaf, vinegar, and water. Cover the pot.
4. Cook on low for 5 to 7 hours.
5. Remove meat; set aside.
6. Turn the setting to high. Add cabbage; cover and cook on high for 15 to 20 minutes or until cabbage is done.
7. Meanwhile, melt butter in a saucepan.
8. Stir in instant onion and flour.
9. Drain 1 1/2 cups broth from the crockpot.
10. Pour broth, horseradish, and salt into the saucepan.
11. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until thickened.
